com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Class ResourceConsumptionLimit

  • java.lang.Object
    • com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ResourceConsumptionLimit
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IResourceConsumptionLimit

    public final class ResourceConsumptionLimit
extends Object
implements IResourceConsumptionLimit
    Description of a resource limit of a 1C:Enterprise cluster

      • getAction

        public int getAction()
        Description copied from interface: IResourceConsumptionLimit
        Gets action type
        Specified by:
        getAction in interface IResourceConsumptionLimit
        Returns:
        • 0 - none
        • 1 - set low thread priority
        • 2 - interrupt current server call
        • 3 - terminate session

      • setAction

        public void setAction(int action)
        Description copied from interface: IResourceConsumptionLimit
        Sets action type

        • 0 - none
        • 1 - set low thread priority
        • 2 - interrupt current server call
        • 3 - terminate session
